behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all required identifiers: DEFAULT_DRAFT_MODEL_EAGLE3, DEFAULT_TARGET_MODEL_EAGLE3, TestEagle3ServerBase, TestEagle3ServerPage, EAGLE3, --dtype=float16, --chunked-prefill-size, 1024, SGLANG_ALLOW_OVERWRITE_LONGER_CONTEXT_LEN, TestEagle3LargeBS, 0.7.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to be true (class names, constants, threshold) without dictating specific line edits or code snippets.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use AST checks for required names/strings, which any valid fix with the specified identifiers would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests parse AST of the file and check for string constants, attribute names, and class names; no code execution or import happens (test_syntax_check only calls ast.parse).

test_not_tautological.reason: Each test requires the specific EAGLE3 identifiers, args, env var, and threshold to be present; a stub cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover imports, class names, algorithm, new args, env override, print name, and score threshold, matching the instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named per-behavior and commented with gate categories like [pr_diff] fail_to_pass.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction doesn't point to line numbers; the target file path is not revealed (tests hardcode it) though the domain ('EAGLE test configuration') is appropriate.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd config edit.
